mapper.insert: INSERT INTO data_authorization (family_id, grantor_id, grantee_id, data_types, expire_time, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{familyId}, #{grantorId}, #{granteeId}, #{dataTypes, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{expireTime}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
